zh.Tolland, Taunton Deane Borough, Somerset: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特托藍德
zh.Taunton Deane Borough, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wolcott於1525年出生在英國薩默塞特托藍德時，他的父親Thomas Wolcott Sr.26歲，母親Margaret Alice Welling25歲。他於大約1550年與Alice Dawes在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1572年在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特托藍德。

zh-hans.Tolland, Taunton Deane Borough, Somerset: 英国英格兰薩默塞特托藍德
zh-hans.Taunton Deane Borough, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wolcott于1525年出生在英国薩默塞特托藍德时，他的父亲Thomas Wolcott Sr.26岁，母亲Margaret Alice Welling25岁。他于大约1550年与Alice Dawes在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1572年在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特托藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Wolcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Surrey): habitational name from Wollacott in Thrushelton (Devon), named from the Old English personal name Wulfnōth + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

History: Henry Wolcott (1578–1655), clothier, came from Tolland, Somerset, England, and settled in Windsor, CT, in 1636. His grandson Roger (1679–1767) was colonial governor of CT; his great-grandson Oliver (1726–1797) was a signer of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: Woolcock
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Wolcott  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wolcott was born in 1525, in Tolland, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas Wolcott Sr., was 26 and his mother, Margaret Alice Welling, was 25. He married Alice Dawes about 1550, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1572, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wolcott est né en 1525, à Tolland, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wolcott Sr., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alice Welling, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Dawes environ 1550, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1572, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Tolland, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wolcott 1525 in Tolland, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wolcott Sr. 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Alice Welling 25. Er hat um 1550 in England, United Kingdom Alice Dawes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1572 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wolcott è nato il nel 1525 nel Tolland, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Thomas Wolcott Sr., aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Alice Welling, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Dawes circa 1550, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1572, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Tolland, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wolcottが1525年にイギリスソメルセトトランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Wolcott Sr.は26歳，母Margaret Alice Wellingは25歳であった。約1550年にイギリスイギリスでAlice Dawesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1572年に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wolcott(이)가 1525년 영국 서머세트 톨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wolcott Sr.(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alice Welling(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice Dawes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 톨랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wolcott nasceu em 1525, em Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wolcott Sr., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Alice Welling, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Dawes aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1572, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wolcott родился в 1525 г. в местности толланд, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wolcott Sr. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alice Welling, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Dawes около 1550 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1572 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности толланд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wolcott nació en 1525, en Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wolcott Sr., tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Alice Welling, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice Dawes aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1572, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
